name: Acquire Policy
description: 3-step flow to purchase a parametric insurance policy NFT

screens.name: Acquire Policy Flow
screens.description: 3-step wizard: Eligibility (verification form based on pool's verificationType), Payment (CZUSD on-chain or Stripe fiat-to-CZUSD), Confirm (coverage summary + gas pre-check + purchasePolicy tx). Pool name and coverage amount shown throughout.

steps.label: Eligibility
steps.description: Verify your eligibility based on pool requirements

steps.label: Payment
steps.description: Pay the policy premium in CZUSD

fields.name: stripeCard
fields.label: Card Details
fields.helperText: Secure card payment via Stripe. CZUSD minted to your wallet after payment.

steps.label: Confirm
steps.description: Review coverage details and confirm purchase

fields.name: gasAck
fields.label: I have ETH/AVAX for gas fees
fields.helperText: You need a small amount of AVAX to cover the transaction gas fee

states.name: Eligibility Step
states.description: Step 1 — verifying eligibility based on pool's verificationType

elementDescriptions.Form Fields: Shows only fields relevant to pool's verificationType (none/identity/flight/employment/property)
elementDescriptions.Next Button: Disabled until required fields are filled

states.name: Submitting Eligibility
triggeredBy: Next button click on eligibility step

elementDescriptions.CZUSD Balance: Shows connected wallet's current CZUSD balance

states.name: Confirm Step
states.description: Step 3 — final review and on-chain purchase
triggeredBy: Payment complete or CZUSD balance sufficient

elementDescriptions.Coverage Summary: Pool name, premium paid, max payout, policy expiry date

elementDescriptions.Confirm Button: Spinner, disabled — wallet signing dialog open

elementDescriptions.Success State: Green checkmark, policy tokenId, txHash link to explorer, View My Coverage button

appFlows.name: Submit eligibility verification
appFlows.trigger: User fills eligibility form and clicks Next

steps.description: EligibilityForm collects fields based on pool's verificationType (none/identity/flight/employment/property)
POST /api/eligibility with { walletAddress, poolAddress, verificationType, formData } — generates SHA-256 proofHash
Server wallet calls EligibilityRegistry.storeProof(user, verificationType, proofHash) on Avalanche Fuji
proofHash returned to client, stored in component state for Step 3

appFlows.outcome: proofHash stored on EligibilityRegistry, user proceeds to Payment step

appFlows.name: Pay with existing CZUSD
appFlows.trigger: User selects 'Pay with CZUSD' and clicks Next in payment step

steps.description: useBalance() reads connected wallet's CZUSD balance from CZUSD.balanceOf(address)
If balance < premium, shows 'Insufficient CZUSD' warning and Buy with Card option
If balance >= premium, advance to Confirm step

appFlows.outcome: User has verified CZUSD balance and is ready to confirm purchase

appFlows.name: Buy CZUSD via Stripe then pay
appFlows.trigger: User selects 'Buy CZUSD with Card' and completes Stripe payment

steps.description: POST /api/stripe-payment with { amount, walletAddress } — creates Stripe PaymentIntent, returns clientSecret
Stripe Elements confirms card payment using clientSecret
Stripe sends payment_intent.succeeded webhook to POST /api/stripe-webhook
Server wallet calls CZUSDConsumer to mint equivalent CZUSD to user's wallet
CZUSD balance updates, user proceeds to Confirm step

appFlows.outcome: CZUSD minted to wallet, user can now pay premium

appFlows.name: Confirm purchase on-chain
appFlows.trigger: User clicks Confirm Purchase on step 3

steps.description: Gas pre-check: useBalance() reads native AVAX balance — warns if < 0.001 AVAX
CZUSD.approve(poolAddress, premium) — user signs approval tx to allow pool to pull premium
InsurancePool.purchasePolicy(proofHash) — ACE checks run (sanctions, KYC, cooling-off, solvency), PolicyNFT minted
Success state shown with tokenId, txHash explorer link, View Coverage button

appFlows.outcome: PolicyNFT minted to user's wallet — active parametric insurance coverage

apiEndpoints.description: Generates proofHash from eligibility form data and stores it on EligibilityRegistry via server wallet

serverFlow.description: Validate walletAddress, poolAddress are valid checksummed addresses
SHA-256 hash of JSON.stringify({ walletAddress, verificationType, ...formData }) → proofHash bytes32
Server wallet sends tx: EligibilityRegistry.storeProof(walletAddress, verificationType, proofHash)
Return { proofHash } — client stores for purchasePolicy() call

errorResponses.when: walletAddress or poolAddress not valid EVM address
Server wallet tx reverted or RPC unreachable

apiEndpoints.description: Creates Stripe PaymentIntent for CZUSD purchase. Amount in USD cents = premium amount.

serverFlow.description: Validate amount > 0 and walletAddress is valid address
Return { clientSecret } to frontend Stripe Elements

apiEndpoints.description: Stripe webhook handler. On payment_intent.succeeded: mints CZUSD to user wallet.

serverFlow.description: stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, signature, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET) — rejects if signature invalid
Extract walletAddress from event.data.metadata, compute CZUSD amount from event.data.amount
Server wallet calls CZUSDConsumer.mint(walletAddress, amount) to issue CZUSD
Return { received: true } — Stripe expects 200 quickly
